ddls:
CREATE TABLE "territories" (
  "territory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each territory */,
  "territory_name" TEXT /* Name of the territory */,
  "border_length" REAL /* Total length of land borders in kilometers */,
  "surface_area" REAL /* Total surface area in square kilometers */,
  "border_area_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of border length to surface area */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the territory */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Name of the capital city */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the territory */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language of the territory */,
  "geographical_location" TEXT /* Textual description of the geographical location */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("territory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "borders" (
  "border_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each border segment */,
  "territory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the territory */,
  "adjacent_territory" TEXT /* Name of the adjacent territory */,
  "border_length" REAL /* Length of the border segment in kilometers */,
  "border_type" TEXT /* Type of border (e.g., land, sea) */,
  "border_coordinates" TEXT /* Coordinates of the border (e.g., in GeoJSON format) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("border_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_borders_territory_id FOREIGN KEY ("territory_id") REFERENCES territories ("territory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "surface_areas" (
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each surface area record */,
  "territory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the territory */,
  "area_type" TEXT /* Type of surface area (e.g., total, land, water) */,
  "area_value" REAL /* Value of the surface area in square kilometers */,
  "area_coordinates" TEXT /* Coordinates of the area (e.g., in GeoJSON format) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surface_areas_territory_id FOREIGN KEY ("territory_id") REFERENCES territories ("territory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "border_area_ratios" (
  "ratio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ratio record */,
  "territory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the territory */,
  "ratio_value" REAL /* Calculated ratio of border length to surface area */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ratio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_border_area_ratios_territory_id FOREIGN KEY ("territory_id") REFERENCES territories ("territory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "territory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the territory the report is about */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "report_visibility" TEXT /* Visibility of the report (e.g., public, private) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_territory_id FOREIGN KEY ("territory_id") REFERENCES territories ("territory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the visualization */,
  "territory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the territory the visualization is about */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., map, chart) */,
  "visualization_date" TEXT /* Date the visualization was generated */,
  "visualization_content" TEXT /* Content of the visualization */,
  "visualization_status" TEXT /* Status of the visualization (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "visualization_visibility" TEXT /* Visibility of the visualization (e.g., public, private) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the visualization was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_territory_id FOREIGN KEY ("territory_id") REFERENCES territories ("territory_id")
)
